metadata.description: AI image and video generation platforms with links to their Terms & Conditions pages
metadata.note: URLs should be periodically verified as platforms frequently update their legal page structures

platforms.name: Midjourney
platforms.description: AI image generator known for artistic coherence and high-fidelity textures

platforms.name: OpenAI (DALL-E / Sora)
platforms.description: DALL-E for image generation and Sora for video generation, both governed by OpenAI's unified terms

platforms.name: Stability AI (Stable Diffusion)
platforms.description: Open-source image generation models including Stable Diffusion

platforms.name: Black Forest Labs (FLUX)
platforms.description: Creators of FLUX image generation models, production-grade visual creation

platforms.name: Adobe Firefly
platforms.description: Adobe's generative AI trained exclusively on Adobe Stock and public domain content

platforms.name: Google Gemini (Imagen / Veo)
platforms.description: Google's generative AI for image (Imagen) and video (Veo) generation

platforms.name: Canva (Magic Media)
platforms.description: Design platform with integrated AI image generation via Magic Media

platforms.name: Leonardo.ai
platforms.description: Full creative suite with Image Guidance and Realtime Canvas features

platforms.name: Ideogram
platforms.description: AI image generator noted for superior typography and text rendering

platforms.name: Recraft
platforms.description: Design-first AI generator that can produce native vector graphics (SVG)

platforms.name: Grok (xAI / Aurora)
platforms.description: xAI's generative platform integrated into X, text-to-video and image via Aurora model

platforms.name: Runway
platforms.description: AI video generation platform with Gen-4 model for creative professionals

platforms.name: Kling AI
platforms.description: AI video generator supporting up to 3-minute clips with native audio and character consistency

platforms.name: Pika
platforms.description: Idea-to-video AI platform for creative video generation

platforms.name: Luma Dream Machine
platforms.description: AI cinematic video generator by Luma Labs

platforms.name: HeyGen
platforms.description: AI avatar video platform for corporate training and multilingual marketing

platforms.name: Synthesia
platforms.description: AI avatar video generation for professional talking-head content

platforms.name: Hailuo AI (MiniMax)
platforms.description: AI video generator by MiniMax, text and image to video

platforms.name: Pictory
platforms.description: AI video maker for fast social media content creation

platforms.name: DeepBrain AI
platforms.description: AI avatar video generation platform (AI Studios)

platforms.name: Higgsfield
platforms.description: Professional AI video studio for prosumer creators

platforms.name: VEED.io
platforms.description: Browser-based video editor with integrated AI generation engines

platforms.name: CapCut
platforms.description: Video editor integrating Sora 2 and Veo 3.1 for AI-generated clips

platforms.name: Freepik
platforms.description: AI creative platform bundling multiple image and video generation models

platforms.name: fal.ai
platforms.description: API aggregator with 985+ endpoints across image, video, audio, and 3D models

platforms.name: Replicate
platforms.description: API platform to run open-source AI models for image, video, and more

platforms.name: getimg.ai
platforms.description: Multi-model aggregator dashboard for video and image generation

platforms.name: Dreamina (CapCut)
platforms.description: CapCut's standalone AI image and video generation platform with avatar tools

platforms.name: Animatix
platforms.terms_note: Enterprise-only platform — no public T&C page found. Terms likely handled via individual enterprise contracts. Contact: https://www.animatix.ai/contact-us
platforms.description: Enterprise AI video production pipeline for studios and agencies, orchestrating multiple AI models from script to screen
